ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-powershell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-powershell
Language: c%23
Microsoft Azure PowerShell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-tools
Language: c%23
Tools repository leveraged by the Azure SDK team.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/R3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/R3
Language: c%23
The new future of dotnet/reactive and UniRx.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MonoGame/MonoGame
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MonoGame/MonoGame
Language: c%23
One framework for creating powerful cross-platform games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
Language: c%23
Lightweight and powerful real-time audio/speech translation tool based on Windows LiveCaptions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TeamWheelWizard/WheelWizard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TeamWheelWizard/WheelWizard
Language: c%23
WheelWizard, Retro Rewind Launcher

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwarden/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwarden/server
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
Language: c%23
An alternative bootstrapper for Roblox with a bunch of extra features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dorssel/usbipd-win
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dorssel/usbipd-win
Language: c%23
Windows software for sharing locally connected USB devices to other machines, including Hyper-V guests and WSL 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/android
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/android
Language: c%23
.NET for Android provides open-source bindings of the Android SDK for use with .NET managed languages such as C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/extensions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/extensions
Language: c%23
This repository contains a suite of libraries that provide facilities commonly needed when creating production-ready applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/macios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/macios
Language: c%23
.NET for iOS, Mac Catalyst, macOS, and tvOS provide open-source bindings of the Apple SDKs for use with .NET managed languages such as C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jellyfin/jellyfin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel
Language: c%23
Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight Armoury Crate alternative for Asus laptops with nearly the same functionality. Works with ROG Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, ProArt, Vivobook, Zenbook, Expertbook, ROG Ally, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tylercamp/palcalc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tylercamp/palcalc
Language: c%23
